waves.point_eqs_str: a['n']=(a['sample']*6.283); a['cubesize']=a['q2']; a['fix']=(div(1,a['cubesize'])*0.5); a['tm']=((a['q1']*4)+(a['sample']*4)); a['taille']=((a['bass']*0.25)+0.3); a['xp']=(((Math.sin(a['tm'])*Math.cos((a['tm']*3)))*a['taille'])+0.5); a['yp']=(((Math.sin((a['tm']*1.1))*Math.sin((a['tm']*4.1)))*a['taille'])+0.5); a['zp']=(((Math.sin((a['tm']*2.9))*Math.cos((a['tm']*1.77)))*a['taille'])+0.5); a['xp']=((div(Math.floor((a['xp']*a['cubesize'])),a['cubesize'])-0.5)+a['fix']); a['yp']=((div(Math.floor((a['yp']*a['cubesize'])),a['cubesize'])-0.5)+a['fix']); a['zp']=((div(Math.floor((a['zp']*a['cubesize'])),a['cubesize'])-0.5)+a['fix']); a['ang']=a['t1']; a['sang']=Math.sin(a['ang']); a['cang']=Math.cos(a['ang']); a['xq']=((a['xp']*a['sang'])+(a['zp']*a['cang'])); a['yq']=a['yp']; a['zq']=((a['xp']*a['cang'])-(a['zp']*a['sang'])); a['xp']=a['xq']; a['yp']=a['yq']; a['zp']=a['zq']; a['ang']=(a['t1']*0.75); a['sang']=Math.sin(a['ang']); a['cang']=Math.cos(a['ang']); a['xq']=a['xp']; a['yq']=((a['yp']*a['sang'])+(a['zp']*a['cang'])); a['zq']=((a['yp']*a['cang'])-(a['zp']*a['sang'])); a['xp']=a['xq']; a['yp']=a['yq']; a['zp']=a['zq']; a['zp']=(a['zp']+2); a['x']=(div(a['xp'],a['zp'])+0.5); a['y']=((div(a['yp'],a['zp'])*1.333)+0.5);

frame_eqs_str: a['decay']=0.985; a['vol']=(((a['bass']+a['mid'])+a['treb'])*0.25); a['vol']=(a['vol']*a['vol']); a['q8']=a['vol']; a['mtime']=(a['mtime']+((a['vol']*0.01)*div(75,a['fps']))); a['q7']=a['mtime']; a['monitor']=div(512,8); a['warp']=0; a['q1']=(a['mtime']*0.9); a['beat']=above(a['vol'], 1.5); a['bc']=Math.max(a['bc'], 0); a['bc']=((Math.abs(equal(a['bc'], 0))>0.00001)?((a['bc']+a['beat'])):((a['bc']-div(div(1,a['fps']),4)))); a['trigger']=equal(a['bc'], 1); a['monitor']=a['bc']; a['size']=(a['size']+a['trigger']); a['size']=((Math.abs(above(a['size'], 9))>0.00001)?(6):(a['size'])); a['mainangle']=((a['q1']*0.255)*0.75); a['kick']=((Math.abs(equal(a['trigger'], 1))>0.00001)?(2):(1)); a['dx']=((Math.cos(a['mainangle'])*0.003)*a['kick']); a['dy']=((Math.sin(a['mainangle'])*0.003)*a['kick']); a['zoom']=(1-((a['vol']*0.005)*Math.abs(Math.cos(a['mainangle'])))); a['q2']=Math.floor(a['size']);
